titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Summer School of Music and Art Records
Yale Summer School of Music and Art Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday October 27, 2018 at 07:01

did.unittitle: Yale Summer School of Music and Art records
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, financial records, program files, and posters documenting the activities and operations of the Yale Summer School of Music and Art in Norfolk, Connecticut, an affiliate of the Yale School of Music and the Yale School of Art.

corpname.part: Yale University. Summer School of Music and Art

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 37 (YRG 37), Records of associations, institutes, centers, and organizations affiliated with Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Summer School of Music and Art Records (RU 328). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, financial records, program files, and posters documenting the activities and operations of the Yale Summer School of Music and Art in Norfolk, Connecticut, an affiliate of the Yale School of Music and the Yale School of Art.

corpname.part: Yale University. Summer School of Music and Art

did.unittitle: Yale Studies for Returning Service Men
Description of Pictures Taken by Yale News Bureau
Opera Budget (Il Re Pastore and The Abduction)
Pianos and Organs: Purchase of, Rental, Tuning
Student Records: Applicants, Budgets, Enrollment Rosters, Schedules, Memoranda, Blank Scholarship and Registration Forms

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
